tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import json, os, time
from rllm_train.config import TrainingConfig

run_id = f'run_{int(time.time())}'
cfg = TrainingConfig(
    model_name='Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct',
    task_type='math',
    dataset='deepscaler',
    dataset_path='',
    num_problems=64, num_epochs=2, batch_size=1, num_generations=4,
    learning_rate=5e-6, temperature=0.7, top_p=0.9,
    max_agent_steps=3,
    max_response_length=1024, max_prompt_length=1024, max_completion_length=1024,
    gradient_checkpointing=True, gradient_accumulation_steps=4,
    run_id=run_id, seed=44, save_model=True,
)
os.makedirs(cfg.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
config_path = os.path.join(cfg.output_dir, 'config.json')
cfg.to_json(config_path)
with open(config_path, 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)
data.update({
    'backend': 'verl', 'num_gpus': 'auto', 'gpu_type': 'A100-40GB',
    'reward_threshold': 0.7, 'plateau_rounds': 3, 'max_rounds': 5,
    'tuning_history': [
        {'run_id': 'run_1780019310', 'status': 'init_timeout', 'reason': 'A100-40GB: vLLM init stuck 20min, gpu_mem=0.4'},
        {'run_id': 'run_1780021136', 'status': 'init_failed', 'reason': 'gpu_mem=0.2 too low for 7B model, ValueError: No available memory for cache blocks'},
        {'run_id': run_id, 'status': 'fix', 'reason': 'gpu_mem 0.2→0.6 (vLLM needs ~24GB for model+KV), FSDP offload frees params to CPU during inference'},
    ]
})
with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
print(f'Config: {config_path}')
print(f'RUN_ID={run_id}')
"

file.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -xeuo pipefail

# VERL GRPO training: Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct
# Data: deepscaler
# Model size bucket: 7B (4 GPUs)
# Generated by rllm_config.verl_config

NNODES=1
NGPUS_PER_NODE=4
export VERL_FILE_LOGGER_PATH=/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/rllm_train/output/runs/run_1780021950/verl_metrics.jsonl

python3 -m verl.trainer.main_ppo \
    algorithm.adv_estimator=grpo \
    algorithm.use_kl_in_reward=False \
    'data.train_files=['"'"'/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/data/deepscaler_verl/train.parquet'"'"']' \
    'data.val_files=['"'"'/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/data/deepscaler_verl/test.parquet'"'"']' \
    data.train_batch_size=16 \
    data.max_prompt_length=1024 \
    data.max_response_length=1024 \
    data.filter_overlong_prompts=True \
    'data.truncation='"'"'error'"'"'' \
    actor_rollout_ref.model.path=/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct \
    actor_rollout_ref.model.use_remove_padding=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.model.enable_gradient_checkpointing=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.optim.lr=5e-06 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.ppo_mini_batch_size=16 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.use_dynamic_bsz=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.ppo_max_token_len_per_gpu=16384 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.use_kl_loss=False \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.entropy_coeff=0.001 \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.fsdp_config.param_offload=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.actor.fsdp_config.optimizer_offload=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.name=vllm \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.tensor_model_parallel_size=1 \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.gpu_memory_utilization=0.4 \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.n=4 \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.log_prob_use_dynamic_bsz=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.rollout.log_prob_max_token_len_per_gpu=16384 \
    actor_rollout_ref.ref.log_prob_use_dynamic_bsz=True \
    actor_rollout_ref.ref.log_prob_max_token_len_per_gpu=16384 \
    actor_rollout_ref.ref.fsdp_config.param_offload=True \
    trainer.balance_batch=True \
    'trainer.logger=["console","file"]' \
    trainer.project_name=verl_grpo_agent \
    trainer.experiment_name=run_1780021950 \
    trainer.n_gpus_per_node=4 \
    trainer.nnodes=1 \
    trainer.save_freq=999 \
    trainer.test_freq=10 \
    trainer.total_epochs=2 \
    trainer.val_before_train=False \
    reward.custom_reward_function.path=/lixiang/project/huxing/Project_test/AgentSDKMetricSkill/custom_rewards/deepscaler_reward.py \
    reward.custom_reward_function.name=compute_score

import json, os, time
from rllm_train.config import TrainingConfig

run_id = f'run_{int(time.time())}'
cfg = TrainingConfig(
    model_name='Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct', task_type='math',
    dataset='deepscaler', dataset_path='',
    num_problems=64, num_epochs=2, batch_size=1, num_generations=4,
    learning_rate=5e-6, temperature=0.7, top_p=0.9,
    max_agent_steps=3, max_response_length=1024, max_prompt_length=1024,
    max_completion_length=1024, gradient_checkpointing=True,
    gradient_accumulation_steps=4, run_id=run_id, seed=45, save_model=True,
)
os.makedirs(cfg.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
config_path = os.path.join(cfg.output_dir, 'config.json')
cfg.to_json(config_path)
with open(config_path, 'r') as f: data = json.load(f)
data.update({
    'backend': 'verl', 'num_gpus': 'auto', 'gpu_type': 'A100-40GB',
    'reward_threshold': 0.7, 'plateau_rounds': 3, 'max_rounds': 5,
    'tuning_history': [
        {'run_id': 'run_1780019310', 'status': 'init_timeout', 'reason': 'gpu_mem=0.4 too low for vLLM+training'},
        {'run_id': 'run_1780021136', 'status': 'init_failed', 'reason': 'gpu_mem=0.2 model cant fit'},
        {'run_id': 'run_1780021950', 'status': 'oom_step1', 'reason': 'gpu_mem=0.6, max_alloc=35.48GB, backward OOM +2GB, mini_batch=16 too large'},
        {'run_id': run_id, 'status': 'fix', 'reason': 'gpu_mem=0.6→0.5, mini_batch=16→8, train_batch=16→8, save ~4GB activation memory'},
    ]
})
with open(config_path, 'w') as f: json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
print(f'Config: {config_path}')
print(f'RUN_ID={run_id}')
"

tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
steps = []
with open('rllm_train/output/runs/run_1780024330/verl_metrics.jsonl') as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.strip():
            steps.append(json.loads(line))

print(f'Total steps: {len(steps)}')
print()
print(f'{\"Step\":>4s} | {\"Reward\":>6s} | {\"R_max\":>6s} | {\"Loss\":>7s} | {\"Grad\":>6s} | {\"Entropy\":>7s} | {\"Clip\":>5s} | {\"Len\":>5s} | {\"Abort\":>5s} | {\"Mem(GB)\":>7s}')
print('-' * 85)
for s in steps:
    d = s['data']
    step = s['step']
    r = d.get('critic/score/mean', 0)
    rm = d.get('critic/score/max', 0)
    l = d.get('actor/pg_loss', 0)
    g = d.get('actor/grad_norm', 0)
    e = d.get('actor/entropy', 0)
    cf = d.get('actor/pg_clipfrac', 0)
    rl = d.get('response_length/mean', 0)
    ab = d.get('response/aborted_ratio', 0)
    mem = d.get('actor/perf/max_memory_allocated_gb', 0)
    print(f'{step:4d} | {r:6.4f} | {rm:6.4f} | {l:+7.4f} | {g:6.4f} | {e:7.4f} | {cf:5.3f} | {rl:5.0f} | {ab:5.3f} | {mem:7.1f}')

# Summary
scores = [s['data'].get('critic/score/mean', 0) for s in steps]
print(f'\nReward: avg={sum(scores)/len(scores):.4f}, max={max(scores):.4f}, min={min(scores):.4f}')
print(f'Trend: {scores[0]:.4f} -> {scores[-1]:.4f}')
"

tool_input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
with open('rllm_train/output/runs/run_1780024330/verl_metrics.jsonl') as f:
    steps = [json.loads(l) for l in f if l.strip()]
n = len(steps)
scores = [s['data'].get('critic/score/mean', 0) for s in steps]
grads = [s['data'].get('actor/grad_norm', 0) for s in steps]
ents = [s['data'].get('actor/entropy', 0) for s in steps]
print(f'Total steps: {n}')
print(f'Reward: avg={sum(scores)/n:.4f} max={max(scores):.4f} min={min(scores):.4f}')
print(f'Reward last 5: {\" -> \".join(f\"{s:.3f}\" for s in scores[-5:])}')
print(f'Grad: avg={sum(grads)/n:.4f}')
print(f'Entropy: {ents[0]:.4f} -> {ents[-1]:.4f}')
# Last step
d = steps[-1]['data']
print(f'\nLast step {steps[-1][\"step\"]}:')
print(f'  R={d[\"critic/score/mean\"]:.4f} Loss={d[\"actor/pg_loss\"]:+.4f} Grad={d[\"actor/grad_norm\"]:.4f} Ent={d[\"actor/entropy\"]:.4f}')
print(f'  Mem={d[\"actor/perf/max_memory_allocated_gb\"]:.1f}GB')
print(f'  Epoch={d[\"training/epoch\"]:.2f}')
"

tool_input.command:
python3 - <<'PYEOF'
import json, os
from pathlib import Path

run_dir = Path('rllm_train/output/runs/run_1780024330')
jsonl = run_dir / 'verl_metrics.jsonl'
config_path = run_dir / 'config.json'

# Load config
with open(config_path) as f:
    config = json.load(f)

# Load all steps
steps = []
with open(jsonl) as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.strip():
            steps.append(json.loads(line))

n = len(steps)
print(f"=== VERL Deep Analysis: run_1780024330 ===")
print(f"Total steps: {n}")
print(f"Config: {config['model_name']}, lr={config['learning_rate']}, epochs={config['num_epochs']}")
print()

# Extract time series
scores = [s['data'].get('critic/score/mean', 0) for s in steps]
score_maxs = [s['data'].get('critic/score/max', 0) for s in steps]
score_mins = [s['data'].get('critic/score/min', 0) for s in steps]
rewards = [s['data'].get('critic/rewards/mean', 0) for s in steps]
adv_means = [s['data'].get('critic/advantages/mean', 0) for s in steps]
adv_maxs = [s['data'].get('critic/advantages/max', 0) for s in steps]
adv_mins = [s['data'].get('critic/advantages/min', 0) for s in steps]
pg_losses = [s['data'].get('actor/pg_loss', 0) for s in steps]
grad_norms = [s['data'].get('actor/grad_norm', 0) for s in steps]
entropies = [s['data'].get('actor/entropy', 0) for s in steps]
clipfracs = [s['data'].get('actor/pg_clipfrac', 0) for s in steps]
ppo_kls = [s['data'].get('actor/ppo_kl', 0) for s in steps]
lrs = [s['data'].get('actor/lr', 0) for s in steps]
resp_lens = [s['data'].get('response_length/mean', 0) for s in steps]
resp_clips = [s['data'].get('response_length/clip_ratio', 0) for s in steps]
aborts = [s['data'].get('response/aborted_ratio', 0) for s in steps]
mem_allocs = [s['data'].get('actor/perf/max_memory_allocated_gb', 0) for s in steps]
epochs = [s['data'].get('training/epoch', 0) for s in steps]
throughputs = [s['data'].get('perf/throughput', 0) for s in steps]
t_gens = [s['data'].get('timing_s/gen', 0) for s in steps]
t_updates = [s['data'].get('timing_s/update_actor', 0) for s in steps]
t_steps = [s['data'].get('timing_s/step', 0) for s in steps]

# ===== 16-Layer Diagnosis =====

diagnosis = {}

# Layer 1: Reward/Score trend
print("=== Layer 1: Reward/Score Trend ===")
first_half = scores[:n//2]
second_half = scores[n//2:]
fh_avg = sum(first_half)/len(first_half)
sh_avg = sum(second_half)/len(second_half)
trend = "上升" if sh_avg > fh_avg * 1.05 else "下降" if sh_avg < fh_avg * 0.95 else "持平"
print(f"  First half avg: {fh_avg:.4f}")
print(f"  Second half avg: {sh_avg:.4f}")
print(f"  Trend: {trend} ({(sh_avg-fh_avg)/max(fh_avg,0.001)*100:+.1f}%)")
print(f"  Max reward: {max(scores):.4f} (step {scores.index(max(scores))+1})")
zero_steps = sum(1 for s in scores if s == 0)
print(f"  Zero-reward steps: {zero_steps}/{n} ({zero_steps/n*100:.0f}%)")
diagnosis['reward_trend'] = trend
diagnosis['zero_reward_ratio'] = zero_steps/n

# Layer 2: KL suppression
print("\n=== Layer 2: KL Suppression ===")
avg_kl = sum(ppo_kls)/n
print(f"  ppo_kl avg: {avg_kl:.6f}")
print(f"  score == reward? {all(abs(s-r)<0.001 for s,r in zip(scores,rewards))}")
print(f"  KL suppression: {'YES - KL killing reward' if avg_kl > 0.01 else 'NO'}")
diagnosis['kl_suppression'] = avg_kl > 0.01

# Layer 3: GRPO group variance
print("\n=== Layer 3: GRPO Group Variance ===")
score_ranges = [mx - mn for mx, mn in zip(score_maxs, score_mins)]
avg_range = sum(score_ranges)/len(score_ranges)
zero_var_steps = sum(1 for r in score_ranges if r < 0.001)
print(f"  Avg score range (max-min): {avg_range:.4f}")
print(f"  Zero variance steps: {zero_var_steps}/{n}")
print(f"  Advantages: avg={sum(adv_means)/n:.4f}, max={max(adv_maxs):.4f}, min={min(adv_mins):.4f}")
diagnosis['grpo_signal'] = 'weak' if zero_var_steps > n*0.3 else 'moderate' if zero_var_steps > n*0.1 else 'ok'

# Layer 4: PPO update strength
print("\n=== Layer 4: PPO Update Strength ===")
avg_grad = sum(grad_norms)/n
avg_clip = sum(clipfracs)/n
zero_grad_steps = sum(1 for g in grad_norms if g < 0.01)
print(f"  grad_norm: avg={avg_grad:.4f}, max={max(grad_norms):.4f}")
print(f"  clipfrac: avg={avg_clip:.4f}")
print(f"  Zero-gradient steps: {zero_grad_steps}/{n} ({zero_grad_steps/n*100:.0f}%)")
print(f"  Diagnosis: {'UPDATE_TOO_WEAK' if zero_grad_steps > n*0.2 else 'OK'}")
diagnosis['update_strength'] = 'weak' if zero_grad_steps > n*0.2 else 'ok'

# Layer 5: Critic (N/A for GRPO)
print("\n=== Layer 5: Critic ===")
print("  GRPO mode - critic disabled (expected)")

# Layer 6: Entropy and exploration
print("\n=== Layer 6: Entropy/Exploration ===")
ent_start = entropies[0]
ent_end = entropies[-1]
ent_avg = sum(entropies)/n
print(f"  Entropy: {ent_start:.4f} -> {ent_end:.4f} (avg={ent_avg:.4f})")
print(f"  Change: {(ent_end-ent_start)/max(ent_start,0.001)*100:+.1f}%")
print(f"  Diagnosis: {'COLLAPSE' if ent_end < 0.01 else 'LOW' if ent_avg < 0.05 else 'OK'}")
diagnosis['entropy'] = 'collapse' if ent_end < 0.01 else 'low' if ent_avg < 0.05 else 'ok'

# Layer 7: Output truncation
print("\n=== Layer 7: Output Truncation ===")
avg_clip = sum(resp_clips)/n
max_clip = max(resp_clips)
print(f"  Response clip ratio: avg={avg_clip:.3f}, max={max_clip:.3f}")
print(f"  Response length: avg={sum(resp_lens)/n:.0f}, max={max(resp_lens):.0f}")
print(f"  Aborted ratio: avg={sum(aborts)/n:.3f}")
print(f"  Diagnosis: {'HIGH_CLIP' if avg_clip > 0.1 else 'OK'}")
diagnosis['truncation'] = 'high' if avg_clip > 0.1 else 'ok'

# Layer 8: Throughput
print("\n=== Layer 8: Throughput ===")
avg_throughput = sum(throughputs)/n
avg_t_step = sum(t_steps)/n
print(f"  Throughput: avg={avg_throughput:.0f} tok/s")
print(f"  Step time: avg={avg_t_step:.1f}s")
print(f"  Total train time: ~{avg_t_step*n/60:.0f}min")

# Layer 9: Memory
print("\n=== Layer 9: Memory ===")
print(f"  Max allocated: avg={sum(mem_allocs)/n:.1f}GB, max={max(mem_allocs):.1f}GB")
print(f"  GPU total: 40.0 GB")
print(f"  Headroom: {40.0-max(mem_allocs):.1f}GB")

# Layer 10: Validation
print("\n=== Layer 10: Validation ===")
val_reward = 0.3125  # from log
print(f"  Val reward: {val_reward:.4f}")
print(f"  Train reward: {sum(scores)/n:.4f}")
print(f"  Train/Val gap: {'SMALL (consistent)' if abs(sum(scores)/n - val_reward) < 0.05 else 'LARGE'}")

# Layer 11: Reward function
print("\n=== Layer 11: Reward Function ===")
print(f"  Reward path: custom_rewards/deepscaler_reward.py")
print(f"  Score range in steps: {min(scores):.4f} - {max(scores):.4f}")
print(f"  Score std: {(sum((s-sum(scores)/n)**2 for s in scores)/n)**0.5:.4f}")
print(f"  Binary reward (0/1 only): {all(s in [0, 0.03125, 0.0625, 0.09375, 0.125, 0.15625, 0.1875, 0.21875, 0.25, 0.28125, 0.3125, 0.375, 0.40625, 0.4375, 0.46875, 0.5, 0.625, 0.6875, 0.75, 0.8125, 0.875, 0.9375, 1.0] for s in scores)}")

# Layer 12: Trajectory (N/A - would need rollout data)

# Layer 13: Data difficulty
print("\n=== Layer 13: Data Difficulty ===")
print(f"  Dataset: deepscaler (256 train, 32 test)")
print(f"  Zero reward steps: {zero_steps}/{n} = {zero_steps/n*100:.0f}%")
print(f"  Perfect reward steps (>=0.5): {sum(1 for s in scores if s >= 0.5)}/{n}")
print(f"  Diagnosis: {'TOO_HARD' if zero_steps > n*0.15 else 'APPROPRIATE' if zero_steps < n*0.05 else 'MODERATE'}")

# Layer 14: Summary
print("\n=== Layer 14-16: Summary ===")
issues = []
if zero_grad_steps > n*0.2:
    issues.append("ZERO_GRAD: Many steps have no learning signal (grad≈0)")
if zero_steps > n*0.1:
    issues.append("ZERO_REWARD: Many steps have all-zero rewards")
if zero_var_steps > n*0.2:
    issues.append("GRPO_DEAD: Many steps have no within-group variance")
if diagnosis['entropy'] == 'collapse':
    issues.append("ENTROPY_COLLAPSE: Policy collapsed")
if avg_clip > 0.1:
    issues.append("HIGH_CLIP: Response truncation significant")
if trend == "下降":
    issues.append("REWARD_DECLINING: Second half worse than first")

print(f"  Issues found: {len(issues)}")
for i, issue in enumerate(issues):
    print(f"  [{i+1}] {issue}")

# Tuning recommendations
print("\n=== Tuning Recommendations ===")
recs = []
if zero_steps > n*0.1 and zero_var_steps > n*0.2:
    recs.append({
        "priority": 1,
        "param": "num_generations (rollout.n)",
        "old": "4",
        "new": "8",
        "reason": f"{zero_var_steps}/{n} steps have zero within-group variance → GRPO can't compute advantage → no learning",
        "expected": "More generations per prompt = higher chance of at least 1 correct answer in each group → GRPO gets learning signal"
    })
if zero_grad_steps > n*0.2:
    recs.append({
        "priority": 2,
        "param": "learning_rate",
        "old": "5e-6",
        "new": "1e-5",
        "reason": f"{zero_grad_steps}/{n} steps have near-zero gradients despite non-zero loss → lr too low for this batch/grad scale",
        "expected": "Stronger updates when learning signal exists"
    })
if trend != "上升":
    recs.append({
        "priority": 3,
        "param": "num_epochs",
        "old": "2",
        "new": "3",
        "reason": "Reward not improving across epochs, but model hasn't converged yet (entropy stable)",
        "expected": "More training passes over data"
    })
recs.append({
    "priority": 4,
    "param": "temperature",
    "old": "0.7",
    "new": "0.9",
    "reason": "Low entropy (0.08-0.15) suggests limited exploration diversity",
    "expected": "More diverse generations → better GRPO group variance"
})

for r in recs:
    print(f"\n  Priority {r['priority']}: {r['param']} {r['old']}→{r['new']}")
    print(f"    Reason: {r['reason']}")
    print(f"    Expected: {r['expected']}")

# Write analysis.json
analysis = {
    "completed": True,
    "run_id": "run_1780024330",
    "backend": "verl",
    "total_steps": n,
    "target_reward": 0.7,
    "metrics": {
        "reward_avg": sum(scores)/n,
        "reward_max": max(scores),
        "reward_min": min(scores),
        "reward_trend": trend,
        "zero_reward_ratio": zero_steps/n,
        "zero_grad_ratio": zero_grad_steps/n,
        "entropy_start": ent_start,
        "entropy_end": ent_end,
        "grad_norm_avg": avg_grad,
        "clip_ratio_avg": avg_clip,
        "val_reward": val_reward,
    },
    "diagnosis": diagnosis,
    "issues": issues,
    "recommendations": recs,
    "reached": sum(scores)/n >= 0.7,
}
analysis_path = run_dir / 'analysis.json'
with open(analysis_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(analysis, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)
print(f"\nAnalysis saved: {analysis_path}")
PYEOF

file.content:
"""
VERL training metrics extractor for rllm-analyze-deep.

Parses VERL training_log.txt (Ray worker + Tracking console output)
into structured metric time series compatible with the 16-layer diagnosis system.
"""

import json
import re
from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any


# Metric extraction patterns
_PATTERNS = {
    "step": re.compile(r"(?:step|global_step)\s*[:=]\s*(\d+)", re.I),
    "epoch": re.compile(r"epoch\s*[:=]\s*([\d.]+)", re.I),
    "score_mean": re.compile(r"(?:score|rewards)/mean\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "score_std": re.compile(r"(?:score|rewards)/std\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "grad_norm": re.compile(r"grad_norm\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "pg_loss": re.compile(r"pg_loss\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "policy_loss": re.compile(r"policy_loss\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "entropy": re.compile(r"entropy\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "lr": re.compile(r"(?:actor/)?lr\s*[:=]\s*([\d.e-]+)"),
    "kl": re.compile(r"(?:ppo_kl|approx_kl)\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "clipfrac": re.compile(r"(?:pg_clipfrac|clipfrac)\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "throughput": re.compile(r"(?:throughput|tokens_per_second)\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "step_time": re.compile(r"step_time\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "response_length": re.compile(r"(?:response_)?length/mean\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
    "error": re.compile(r"Traceback|Error|OOM|out of memory|Killed", re.I),
    "complete": re.compile(r"Training (?:completed|finished)", re.I),
    "val_score": re.compile(r"val(?:-core)?/.*?(?:score|reward)/mean@?\d*\s*[:=]\s*([\d.-]+)"),
}


def extract_verl_metrics(log_path: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    """Extract structured metrics from a VERL training log.

    Returns a dict with:
        - rewards: list of [step, score_mean]
        - losses: list of [step, pg_loss]
        - grad_norms: list of [step, grad_norm]
        - entropies: list of [step, entropy]
        - throughputs: list of [step, tokens_per_second]
        - val_scores: list of [step, val_score_mean]
        - completed: bool
        - errors: list of error messages
        - total_steps: int
        - summary: dict with final metrics
    """
    if not Path(log_path).exists():
        return {"error": f"Log file not found: {log_path}", "completed": False}

    with open(log_path, "r", errors="replace") as f:
        lines = f.readlines()

    current_step = 0
    current_metrics: dict[str, float] = {}
    steps: list[dict] = []
    errors: list[str] = []
    val_scores: list[tuple[int, float]] = []
    completed = False

    for line in lines:
        # Check for errors
        if _PATTERNS["error"].search(line):
            if not re.search(r"WARNING|UserWarning|FutureWarning|Deprecated", line):
                errors.append(line.strip()[:200])

        # Check for completion
        if _PATTERNS["complete"].search(line):
            completed = True

        # Extract step number
        step_m = _PATTERNS["step"].search(line)
        if step_m:
            new_step = int(step_m.group(1))
            if new_step != current_step:
                # Save previous step
                if current_metrics:
                    current_metrics["step"] = current_step
                    steps.append(dict(current_metrics))
                current_step = new_step
                current_metrics = {}

        # Extract metrics
        for key, pattern in _PATTERNS.items():
            if key in ("step", "epoch", "error", "complete", "val_score"):
                continue
            m = pattern.search(line)
            if m:
                try:
                    current_metrics[key] = float(m.group(1))
                except ValueError:
                    pass

        # Extract val scores
        val_m = _PATTERNS["val_score"].search(line)
        if val_m:
            try:
                val_scores.append((current_step, float(val_m.group(1))))
            except ValueError:
                pass

    # Save last step
    if current_metrics:
        current_metrics["step"] = current_step
        steps.append(dict(current_metrics))

    # Build time series
    def _series(key: str) -> list:
        return [[s["step"], s[key]] for s in steps if key in s]

    rewards = _series("score_mean")
    losses = _series("pg_loss") or _series("policy_loss")
    grad_norms = _series("grad_norm")
    entropies = _series("entropy")
    throughputs = _series("throughput")

    # Summary
    final_reward = rewards[-1][1] if rewards else None
    max_reward = max(r[1] for r in rewards) if rewards else None
    final_loss = losses[-1][1] if losses else None

    return {
        "completed": completed,
        "total_steps": current_step,
        "num_error_events": len(errors),
        "errors": errors[-5:] if errors else [],
        "rewards": rewards,
        "losses": losses,
        "grad_norms": grad_norms,
        "entropies": entropies,
        "throughputs": throughputs,
        "val_scores": [[s, v] for s, v in val_scores],
        "summary": {
            "final_reward": final_reward,
            "max_reward": max_reward,
            "final_loss": final_loss,
            "reward_trend": [r[1] for r in rewards[-10:]] if rewards else [],
            "loss_trend": [l[1] for l in losses[-10:]] if losses else [],
            "completed": completed,
        },
    }


def extract_and_save(log_path: str, output_path: str | None = None) -> str:
    """Extract VERL metrics and save as JSON. Returns output path."""
    metrics = extract_verl_metrics(log_path)
    if output_path is None:
        output_path = str(Path(log_path).parent / "verl_metrics.json")
    with open(output_path, "w") as f:
        json.dump(metrics, f, indent=2, default=str)
    return output_path


if __name__ == "__main__":
    import sys
    if len(sys.argv) < 2:
        print(f"Usage: python {__file__} <training_log.txt> [output.json]")
        sys.exit(1)
    log_path = sys.argv[1]
    out_path = sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv) > 2 else None
    path = extract_and_save(log_path, out_path)
    print(f"Metrics saved to: {path}")
    metrics = extract_verl_metrics(log_path)
    summary = metrics.get("summary", {})
    print(f"Steps: {metrics['total_steps']}, "
          f"Final reward: {summary.get('final_reward')}, "
          f"Completed: {metrics['completed']}")

  ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS:
  
  1. GRPO SIGNAL QUALITY (Critical):
     - 27% of steps (17/64) have zero gradient -> no learning
     - These steps have UNIFORM reward within the group:

     - With rollout.n=4, probability of all-same = P(all correct) + P(all wrong)
     - For P(correct)=0.3: P(all same) = 0.3^4 + 0.7^4 = 0.008+0.24 = 0.248
     - Theory matches observation: ~25% zero-gradient steps
     
  2. POLICY UPDATE EFFECTIVENESS (Critical):
     - ppo_kl = 0.000 for ALL steps -> policy barely changed

     - Truncated responses may lose the final answer -> reward=0

      WHY: More generations per prompt = lower P(all same) = more GRPO signal
      CALC: P(all same, n=8, p=0.3) = 0.3^8+0.7^8 = 0.00007+0.058 = 5.8%

      RISK: OOM on A100-40GB. Must reduce train_batch_size to compensate.

      RISK: Instability. Monitor ppo_kl for spikes.

  P4: Increase temperature from 0.7 to 0.9
      WHY: Entropy 0.08-0.15 is moderate but more diversity helps GRPO
      EVIDENCE: Higher diversity -> more reward variance -> stronger advantage signal
      RISK: More random outputs, may reduce mean quality slightly
""")

python3 -c "
import json, os, time
from rllm_train.config import TrainingConfig

# R5: Based on R4 deep_analysis recommendations
run_id = f'run_{int(time.time())}'

# Parameter safety check for 7B model:
# - lr: 1e-5 is within 7B safe range (2e-6 ~ 5e-6 per skill doc)
#   WARNING: 1e-5 exceeds 7B recommended range. 
#   But R4 showed ppo_kl=0 for ALL steps — policy literally didn't move.
#   Accepting this risk with monitoring.
# - num_generations: 8 within range (2-8)
# - temperature: 0.9 within range (0.3-1.5)
# - VERL mode: TRL divisibility constraint does not apply

cfg = TrainingConfig(
    model_name='Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct',
    task_type='math',
    dataset='deepscaler',
    dataset_path='',
    num_problems=64,
    num_epochs=2,
    batch_size=1,
    num_generations=8,              # 4→8: reduce zero-signal from 25% to 6%
    learning_rate=1e-5,             # 5e-6→1e-5: policy wasn't updating (ppo_kl=0)
    temperature=0.9,                # 0.7→0.9: increase exploration diversity
    top_p=0.9,
    max_agent_steps=3,
    max_response_length=1536,       # 1024→1536: reduce truncation
    max_prompt_length=1024,
    max_completion_length=1536,
    gradient_checkpointing=True,
    gradient_accumulation_steps=4,
    run_id=run_id,
    seed=46,                        # New seed per round
    save_model=True,
)

os.makedirs(cfg.output_dir, exist_ok=True)
config_path = os.path.join(cfg.output_dir, 'config.json')
cfg.to_json(config_path)

with open(config_path, 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

data.update({
    'backend': 'verl',
    'num_gpus': 'auto',
    'gpu_type': 'A100-40GB',
    'reward_threshold': 0.7,
    'plateau_rounds': 3,
    'max_rounds': 5,
    'tuning_history': [
        {'run_id': 'run_1780019310', 'status': 'init_timeout', 'params': 'gpu_mem=0.4'},
        {'run_id': 'run_1780021136', 'status': 'init_failed', 'params': 'gpu_mem=0.2'},
        {'run_id': 'run_1780021950', 'status': 'oom_step1', 'params': 'gpu_mem=0.6, batch=16'},
        {'run_id': 'run_1780024330', 'status': 'completed', 'reward_avg': 0.301,
         'params': 'gpu_mem=0.5, batch=8, n=4, lr=5e-6',
         'issues': '27% zero-grad, ppo_kl=0, 16.5% truncation'},
        {'run_id': run_id, 'status': 'fix',
         'changes': 'n=4→8, lr=5e-6→1e-5, max_resp=1024→1536, temp=0.7→0.9, batch=8→4'},
    ]
})

with open(config_path, 'w') as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

print(f'Config: {config_path}')
print(f'RUN_ID={run_id}')

# Safety warnings
warnings = []
if 1e-5 > 5e-6:
    warnings.append('⚠️ lr=1e-5 exceeds 7B recommended max (5e-6), but justified by ppo_kl=0')
print(f'\nWarnings: {len(warnings)}')
for w in warnings:
    print(f'  {w}')
"

    zero_g = sum(1 for g in grads if g < 0.01)
    print(f'Steps: {n}/128')
    print(f'Reward: avg={sum(scores)/n:.4f} max={max(scores):.4f}')
    print(f'Grad zero: {zero_g}/{n} ({zero_g/n*100:.0f}%)')
    print(f'PPO KL: avg={sum(kls)/n:.6f} max={max(kls):.6f}')
    print(f'Clipfrac: avg={sum(clips)/n:.4f}')
    print(f'Memory: {max(mems):.1f}GB')
    print(f'Last 5 rewards: {\" -> \".join(f\"{s:.3f}\" for s in scores[-5:])}')
else:
    print('No metrics yet - still initializing')
    # Check for errors
    if log.exists():
        tail = log.read_text()[-2000:]
        for kw in ['Error', 'OOM', 'Traceback', 'ValueError']:
            if kw in tail:
                print(f'WARNING: {kw} found in log!')
                # Print error context
                idx = tail.rfind(kw)
                print(tail[max(0,idx-200):idx+300])
                break
"
